title: Cockpit bootstrap: two tabs, three cockpit panes, rooted at the MAIN checkout
action: One command that builds D13's layout. Required flag --main-root PATH: the cockpit's panes MUST be rooted at the MAIN checkout, because `bee worktree new` and `bee worktree merge` both refuse to run from inside a linked worktree - without this the dispatch loop would fail every single iteration while dutifully continuing, which is the silent stall D6's rationale exists to prevent. Required --workspace ID. The script CREATES BOTH TABS explicitly: `herdr tab create --label cockpit --cwd <main-root>` and `herdr tab create --label runtime --cwd <main-root>`; it never repurposes the workspace's pre-existing root tab. Cockpit is then split `--direction right` and that right pane `--direction down`, yielding chat / dispatch / merge. Do NOT label the control panes - self-naming is D17's contract. Flags --no-start (build the layout, launch no agent) and --dry-run (print the herdr commands, execute nothing). Directory name is herdr-orchestrating (D21). Byte-identical copies in both roots.

truths: A fresh workspace ends with exactly 3 tabs and exactly 5 panes: its own root tab and pane, plus cockpit (3 panes) and runtime (1 pane)
--main-root is required and is passed as the cwd of both created tabs
The script never labels the dispatch or merge pane
The verify closes its throwaway workspace even when an assertion fails

artifacts.substantive: layout builder rooted at the main checkout, with dry-run and no-start modes

prohibitions: Do not label the dispatch or merge pane (D17)
Do not touch any workspace other than the one named by --workspace
Do not use herdr worktree create|open|remove

verify: set -e; S=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/bootstrap-cockpit.sh; N=$(node -e "const j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));console.log(j.result.workspace.workspace_id)" <<< "$(herdr workspace create --cwd /tmp --label apo-verify --no-focus)"); trap 'herdr workspace close "$N" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true' EXIT; bash "$S" --workspace "$N" --main-root /home/vantt/projects/herdr-gateway --no-start; T=$(herdr tab list --workspace "$N" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).result.tabs.length))"); P=$(herdr pane list --workspace "$N" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).result.panes.length))"); test "$T" = 3; test "$P" = 5; diff -q "$S" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/bootstrap-cockpit.sh; echo LAYOUT_OK
